name: Kale Salad with Creamy Dressing
intro: This creamy dressing can also double as a delicious dip for Friday evening cozy get-togethers. Change it up by adding in chopped black olives and sun-dried tomatoes, or capers and finely chopped green olives. Cut up some vegetable sticks, and you’re ready to start dipping!
method: Rinse and strip the kale from the stem. Chop the kale into smaller pieces. Process the ingredients for the dressing in a blender. Start with a small amount of water and add a little bit by bit. Add and mix the dressing into the kale leaves, preferably using your hands. If you want to make a dip, process all the dressing’s ingredients in a food processor instead. Top the salad with sauerkraut and pomegranate seeds.
